stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct with regards to the scope of the PBN concept?

options.a: For oceanic/remote, en-route and terminal phases of flight, PBN accommodates both linear and angular laterally guided operations.
options.b: In the approach phases of flight, PBN is limited to operations with guidance to fly the ILS procedure.
options.c: For oceanic/remote, en-route and terminal phases of flight, PBN is limited to operations with angular laterally guided operations.
options.d: In the approach phases of flight, PBN accommodates both linear and angular laterally guided operations.
